name: stat
description: A single headline metric: a prominent value with a describing label. Used in stat rows to make impact concrete.

align.description: Alignment of the value and label.

a11y.contrast: Value meets 3:1 (large text); label meets 4.5:1 on its surface.
notes: The value and label are read together as one figure; the label always states what the number means.
A unit or qualifier belongs in the value or label text, never conveyed by styling alone.

elementor.notes: Compiles to a small stack container: the value (heading) above the label (text).

mapping.size: Style → value Typography, bound to a Global Font
